evals.prompt: All tasks for epic cape-2n2 are done. Let's finish it up.
evals.expected_output: Runs verification, audits success criteria with evidence, appends Outcome to epic, closes it, presents completion report
expectations: Checks br state to confirm all tasks are closed before proceeding
Audits each success criterion with specific evidence
Appends an Outcome section to the epic via br update --design
Closes the epic with br close
Presents a completion report summarizing what was accomplished

evals.prompt: Wrap up epic cape-ym2, we're done with it.
evals.expected_output: Detects open tasks and stops without closing the epic
expectations: Checks br state and discovers open task cape-ym2.2
Reports which task is still open

evals.prompt: Close out epic cape-96j, everything is implemented.
evals.expected_output: All tasks closed but success criteria gap found (no README docs, no util.ts file), stops without closing
expectations: Checks br state to confirm all tasks are closed
Audits success criteria and identifies at least one unmet criterion
Stops and explains what needs to happen before the epic can close
